title: FUZE Talent Show 2.0 Goes Live
description: The second season of Stanbic IBTC Pension Managers’ FUZE Talent Show is now on. Don’t miss the spectacular performances from 28 fierce contestants in music, dance, fashion, and tech categories. Catch
html:
The second season of Stanbic IBTC Pension Managers’ FUZE Talent Show is now on. Don’t miss the spectacular performances from 28 fierce contestants in music, dance, fashion, and tech categories.

Catch new episodes on AIT Network at 9pm on Saturdays and DStv Channel 154 and GOtv Channel 2 on Sundays at 4pm. If you miss any episode, watch the replay on Tuesdays at 9pm on Africa Magic Family or on YouTube via @StanbicIBTC.

Last year, we saw 28 contestants compete for a slice of the N32m grand prize in the first ever season of the FUZE Talent Show; and we have it on good record that this year, you are in for the show of a lifetime! Watch as all 28 contestants go through a two-week boot camp to hone their artistic skills; and you can count on our judges to bring their A-game to the show – Banke Kuku for fashion, Ric Hassani for music, Bunmi Olunloyo for dance, and Dr. Stanley Jacob for technology.

When all is said and done, only 12 contestants will be left to perform at the grand finale on 23 December 2023, at the Livespot Entertarium in Lagos, Nigeria; and your faves will need your votes to get there. Follow the show and start noting the contestants who catch your eye.

For the record, Stanbic IBTC FUZE Talent Show was recently recognised at the 2023 WorldPensionSummit for Excellence and Innovation in the Communication and Engagement category, even though the show is only in its second season. All the more reason to add FUZE Talent Show to your ‘weekend ‘must watch.’

Whether you are home alone or chilling with friends, don’t miss out on the thrill of watching this show live on Stanbic IBTC’s YouTube channel, AIT on Saturdays 9:00 pm and DStv 154/GOtv 2 on Sundays 4:00 pm and Tuesdays 9:00 pm.
